info.title: Songlink / Odesli API
info.description: The Songlink/Odesli API allows you to look up a song, album, or artist across multiple streaming platforms. Given a URL from any supported platform (Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube, Deezer, Tidal, etc.), it returns links to the same content on all other supported platforms. Useful for creating universal music sharing links.

get.summary: Get links for a song or album across platforms
get.description: Given a streaming platform URL (or platform + entity type + unique ID), returns links to the same content on all supported platforms. Supports Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube, YouTube Music, Deezer, Tidal, Amazon Music, SoundCloud, Pandora, Napster, and more.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL of the song/album on any supported platform (e.g., a Spotify or Apple Music URL). Either this or the platform/type/id combination is required.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: The platform of the entity (used with type and id instead of url)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The entity type (used with platform and id instead of url)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The platform-specific unique ID (used with platform and type instead of url)

parameters.name: userCountry
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. Affects which links are returned based on availability.

parameters.name: songIfSingle
parameters.description: If true, when the input is a single-track album, the API returns the song instead of the album.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: API key for higher rate limits. Optional for basic usage.

apiKey.name: key
apiKey.description: Optional API key for higher rate limits. Contact Songlink/Odesli for a key.

entityUniqueId.description: The unique identifier for the matched entity (format: PLATFORM_ENTITYTYPE::ID)

userCountry.description: The country code used for the response

pageUrl.description: The Songlink/Odesli page URL that displays all available links

linksByPlatform.description: Map of platform names to their link objects

entitiesByUniqueId.description: Map of entity unique IDs to their details

entityUniqueId.description: Reference to an entity in entitiesByUniqueId

url.description: The direct URL to the content on this platform

nativeAppUriMobile.description: URI to open the content in the native mobile app

nativeAppUriDesktop.description: URI to open the content in the native desktop app

title.description: The title of the song or album

thumbnailUrl.description: URL to the album/song artwork thumbnail

thumbnailWidth.description: Width of the thumbnail in pixels

thumbnailHeight.description: Height of the thumbnail in pixels

apiProvider.description: The API provider that supplied this entity data

platforms.description: The platform(s) this entity is available on

BadRequest.description: Invalid request. Missing or malformed parameters.

NotFound.description: No matching content found across platforms.

RateLimited.description: Rate limit exceeded. Use an API key for higher limits.
